articles.title: Tether Denies Allegations of U.S. Investigation on AML Violations
articles.description: Tether denies allegations of a U.S. government investigation into anti-money laundering violations, calling recent claims "pure speculation".

articles.title: VanEck and Kiln Team Up to Offer Easy Solana Staking for Big Investors
articles.description: VanEck partners with Kiln to offer institutional investors easy access to Solana staking, aiming to bridge traditional finance with digital assets.

articles.title: Swell switches to OP Stack to develop rollup, replacing earlier plan to use Polygon CDK
articles.description: Swell is transitioning to Optimism’s Superchain ecosystem and developing an optimistic rollup on the OP Stack.
